rows.label: tev012201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Powell about the residents of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Powell if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Powell for his thoughts on the Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Powell about Blue Bloods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Powell about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Buncha White Whale crew was lost
in the attack that sent us
crashing down to this planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0002
rows.name:
We've made this giant city our home, even though we ain't
got the population for it. And while I'm glad they found
new survivors, they're just a drop in the bucket.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0003
rows.name:
And a lack of people means a
lack of customers, which means
Army Pizza ain't selling squat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0004
rows.name:
And sure, it gives me and the wife plenty of time
to experiment with new recipes while we wait for
customers to show, but that ain't enough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0005
rows.name:
Can't you and your BLADE pals do
something to help us out? Maybe search
for more survivors or something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0008
rows.name:
I tell ya, running this business ain't getting any
easier. And while all sorts of things have gone
wrong, the biggest problem at this point is traffic.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0009
rows.name:
We at Army Pizza take pride in our promise
to deliver in 30 minutes or less.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0010
rows.name:
But most of the roads to the residential
district ain't even connected yet, so
delivery takes way longer than it should.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0011
rows.name:
My poor wife Camilla is working her butt
off already, and as business improves, her
job's gonna become next to impossible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0012
rows.name:
I know BLADE's making a lot of progress blazing trails
in the outside world, but what about INSIDE NLA? Can't
they hurry up with these damn roads already?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0020
rows.name:
Sorry, pal. If you're here for the grenade
pizza, you're gonna have to wait.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0021
rows.name:
Oh, you wanted to ask me about the Ma-non? Well,
I don't know much, but I do know one thing... They
absolutely LOVE pizza! Every last one of 'em![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0022
rows.name:
They line up outside my place morning,
noon, and night, asking for pizza like a
dying man begging for a glass of water.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0023
rows.name:
Needless to say, Army Pizza is
doing great. So great, in fact,
that I'm in way over my head![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0024
rows.name:
The wife and I have been working
nonstop ever since the Ma-non got
here. We never get a break![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0025
rows.name:
But hey, if you've got some time on your hands,
you wanna help me and Camilla out? Maybe put a
little extra spending money in your pocket?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0028
rows.name:
One of our regulars, Gerome, has been
causing trouble with our Ma-non customers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0029
rows.name:
He sits as far away from the Ma-non
as he can and just...glares at 'em.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0030
rows.name:
I know he had a hard time of
it when the xenos attacked
Earth, but hell! We all did![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0031
rows.name:
And no matter how many times I tell
him to stow that baggage and try to
get along, he just can't do it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0032
rows.name:
This planet is humanity's last refuge, you
know? I just want him to accept the situation
and find some way to make a life for himself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0040
rows.name:
They don't revive Blue Bloods that
perish from suicide. "Out of respect
for their wishes," is the official line.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0041
rows.name:
But I know better. They just
don't want to use parts on
someone who might...do that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0042
rows.name:
It ain't fair! So long as
you're alive, there's always
a chance at a fresh start![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0043
rows.name:
Couldn't we at least give 'em one
chance? One Blue Blood revival?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0047
rows.name: Lately, I... Well...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0048
rows.name: Never mind. It's nothing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0049
rows.name:
We should talk about
Gerome. He doing okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0050
rows.name:
He ain't been to the restaurant much
since it started filling up with Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012201_MSG0051
rows.name:
Sure wish he'd stop by. He was one
of my few human regulars, ya know?[ST:wait ]
